name: @untitled-devs/wasla
description: Universal synchronization layer for AI agent orchestrators

scripts.build: npm run visualizer:build && npm run build:cli
scripts.build:cli: npm run check && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('apps/visualizer/dist', 'dist/visualizer', { recursive: true })"
scripts.setup: npm run build && node dist/apps/cli/src/index.js setup
scripts.setup:claude: npm run build && node dist/apps/cli/src/index.js setup claude --scope workspace
scripts.setup:gemini: npm run build && node dist/apps/cli/src/index.js setup gemini --scope workspace
scripts.setup:openclaw: npm run build && node dist/apps/cli/src/index.js setup openclaw --scope workspace
scripts.setup:opencode: npm run build && node dist/apps/cli/src/index.js setup opencode --scope workspace
scripts.setup:cursor: npm run build && node dist/apps/cli/src/index.js setup cursor --scope workspace
scripts.setup:github-copilot: npm run build && node dist/apps/cli/src/index.js setup github-copilot --scope workspace
scripts.setup:github-copilot-cli: npm run build && node dist/apps/cli/src/index.js setup github-copilot-cli --scope workspace
scripts.watch: npm run build && node dist/apps/cli/src/index.js watch
scripts.visualizer: npm run visualizer:install && npm run build && node dist/apps/cli/src/index.js visualizer
scripts.check: npm run type:check && npm run format:check
scripts.fix: npm run format && npm run lint:fix
scripts.clean: node -e "['dist', '.nyc_output', 'output', 'coverage'].forEach(p => require('fs').rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true }))"
scripts.all: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run check && npm test

author: Mustafa BAHAA
